hooks.command: bash -c 'TTY_ID=$(tty 2>/dev/null | tr "/" "_") || exit 0; sentinel="/tmp/dechord-notify-${TTY_ID}.pending"; [ -f "$sentinel" ] || exit 0; REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; "$REPO_ROOT/ops/scripts/send-telegram-summary.sh" --sentinel-file "$sentinel" && rm -f "$sentinel"; exit 0'
